haikus.haiku:
Bubbling pots of joy,
Tender shrimp sizzle and pop,
Garlic whispers spice.
Happy #NationalShrimpDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight spills like joy,
Dust bunnies take their last bow,
Fresh scents fill the air.
Happy #CleanUpYourRoomDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Chocolate cake towers,
Sprinkles rain like confetti,
Balloons float on dreams.
#HappyBirthdayDonovan from @ClamBakeSanta
